nasb.text: Their appearance is blacker than soot, They are not recognized in the streets; Their skin is shriveled on their bones, It is withered, it has become like wood.

esv.text: Now their face is blacker than soot; they are not recognized in the streets; their skin has shriveled on their bones; it has become as dry as wood.

cnv.text: 現在他們的面貌比煤炭還黑，在街上再沒有人認得他們； 他們皮包骨頭，枯瘦如柴。

ccb.text: 现在，他们的面目比煤炭还黑， 走在街上无人认得。 他们骨瘦如柴，干如枯木。
